issues: entries is a spec Seq<Option<PTDir>>; self.entries@ does not validly/automatically produce Seq<Option<PTDirView>>, so the view body mismatches the declared PTDirView shape.
Value already carries spec type Seq<u8>; projecting it as s@ is likely a typecheck error without a dependency View, and should preserve the sequence directly.

Token and os::State are marked uncovered, so using <T as View>::V and self.field@ assumes dependency View impls that are not known to exist; this will fail typecheck unless those leaf views are synthesized separately.
